---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Problem / use case**
What compliance or workflow problem would this solve? Who benefits (ISSO, analyst, executive…)?

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to see.

**Alternatives considered**
Other approaches you thought about.

**Additional context**
Relevant framework/control references (NIST 800-53, RMF step, etc.) or mockups.
